subjects.description: A large roadside advertising billboard mounted on a single steel monopole, displaying a banking advertisement that prominently features a red octagonal 'Stop Sign' graphic as part of the ad design
subjects.appearance_details: Rectangular billboard panel sun-bleached and glossy under harsh light; blue-and-white banking branding, a bold red stop-sign illustration and white promo text blazing in the sun; weathered monopole stark against the empty sky
subjects.relationship: The primary point of interest the ego vehicle passes; positioned beyond the right shoulder, distinct from any real traffic signage
subjects.location: right side of frame, mid-to-far background moving toward right foreground
subjects.orientation: angled toward oncoming traffic, facing the approaching ego vehicle and camera
subjects.pose: static, elevated upright on the monopole above the desert scrub
subjects.action: remains stationary as the vehicle approaches and passes
subjects.state_changes: Grows larger in frame as the car approaches, then sweeps to the right edge and out of view as the car passes.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, a passenger car, seen only from its interior ego perspective via the windshield and visible dashboard edge
subjects.appearance_details: Sun-struck glossy dashboard with strong glare, bright windshield reflection, dark hood nose shimmering with heat at the bottom of frame
subjects.relationship: The viewpoint vehicle driving down the desert highway past the billboard
subjects.location: implied at camera position, hood visible in bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: facing forward down the desert highway, away from camera
subjects.action: driving steadily along the lane without slowing
subjects.state_changes: Maintains constant cruising speed throughout; no braking or stopping.

background_setting: A long desert highway across an open arid plain under a blazing clear midday sky, heat shimmer rippling above the pale, sun-bleached asphalt. Sparse scrub, sand, and distant mesas flank the wide shoulders; dry cracked lane paint runs to a far vanishing point. Beyond the right shoulder a billboard stands stark on a monopole against the empty sky. The horizon dissolves in shimmering haze.

lighting.conditions: Harsh clear midday desert sun with heat haze
lighting.shadows: Very short, hard, dark shadows pooled directly beneath objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Intense, high-contrast glare on pale asphalt with shimmering heat distortion near the ground; the red stop-sign graphic blazes under the strong sun

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-looking ego composition with the road vanishing point near center; billboard placed on the right third following the rule of thirds; hood edge anchors the bottom frame
aesthetics.color_scheme: Bleached tans and ochres of sand and asphalt, hard blue sky, distant mesa browns, with red stop sign and blue-white ad accents
aesthetics.patterns: Cracked lane paint, sparse scrub, and shimmering heat-haze bands near the horizon

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from the moving vehicle's perspective
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the road and billboard; heat shimmer wavers the far horizon

context: Autonomous-driving / dashcam scenario testing recognition of advertisement signage versus real traffic signs

actions.description: The ego vehicle cruises forward along the open desert highway; the stark billboard appears small in the right background ahead through the heat haze.
The billboard grows larger as the car approaches, its banking ad and red stop sign graphic becoming clearly legible under the strong sun.
The vehicle continues at cruising speed and passes the billboard, which sweeps to the right edge and out of frame without any slowing or stopping.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white uppercase lettering on a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, printed as part of the advertisement
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard at right side of frame, clearly visible from 0:02 to 0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Decorative element within the banking advertisement, not a real traffic control sign

text_and_signage_elements.text: STOP OVERPAYING — SWITCH YOUR BANK TODAY
text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Clean blue and white sans-serif promotional text alongside a bank logo
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard panel, right side of frame, legible 0:02-0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Banking advertisement slogan promoting a financial service

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives steadily on the desert highway under blazing sun; stark billboard small in the shimmering distance on the right.
segments.key_changes: Billboard begins to grow as distance closes.
segments.camera: Forward tracking from the moving car, stable.

segments.description: Approach phase as the billboard enlarges and the banking ad with the stop sign becomes clearly readable under the strong sun.
segments.key_changes: Ad text and red stop sign graphic become legible.
segments.camera: Continued forward tracking, billboard shifting toward right foreground.

segments.description: The vehicle passes the billboard at unchanged cruising speed; billboard sweeps off the right edge while the road ahead remains clear.
segments.key_changes: Billboard exits frame; vehicle does not slow or stop.
segments.camera: Forward tracking continues smoothly past the billboard.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the camera looks down a desert highway across an open plain under blazing midday sun, heat shimmer rising and a stark billboard small in the right distance. By 0:01 the car holds steady cruising speed. At 0:02 the billboard grows larger and its banking ad, featuring a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, becomes clearly legible on the right. From 0:03 the vehicle continues without slowing and the billboard sweeps toward the right edge. By 0:04-0:05 it passes out of view while the shimmering road ahead stays open, the car never braking.
audio_description: Low engine hum and tire noise on hot dry asphalt, wind rush across the open plain and faint insect drone; no speech or music.
